name: sodium
description: Shared project memory and lifecycle checkpoints for Codex, Claude Code, and Orca worktrees.

interface.shortDescription: Shared memory for every coding agent.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to the Sodium remote MCP brain and preserve project decisions across fresh sessions, tasks, and Orca worktrees.
interface.defaultPrompt: Orient to this project with Sodium before editing and checkpoint durable decisions before finishing.
